'''Toloran''' was the [[Tolo]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], located in the [[Panto system]] along with [[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]]. A winter wonderland that attracted tourists, it was also inhabited by [[ice dragon]]s. It was far enough away from its [[Star/Legends|sun]] that it had a cold climate. Like all locations in the system, it was dedicated to tourism and entertainment. Mountaintop resorts let clientele enjoy [[Winter/Legends|winter]] activities such as [[repulsor skiing]], [[Hoversled/Legends|hover sledding]], and wilderness survival camps. Tourists could also travel on the ''[[Snow Nara]]'' [[ice barge]] through ice floes and on hunting expeditions for [[ice dragon]]s.<ref name="TTS" />
